rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) bears no relation to Educ. Code §12.127, which governs liability of management companies providing services to open-enrollment charter schools. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: A management company that provides management services to an open-enrollment charter school is liable for damages incurred by the state as a result of the failure of the company to comply with its contractual or other legal obligation to provide services to the school.
_note: Rule text concerns charter school management company liability; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict.
